retrieval.note: Same corpus, queries, k and cutoff; only the embedder changes (it sits behind a port).

llm_judge.method: Answers generated once; the judge runs 5x over the fixed answers, so the standard deviation isolates judge variance rather than generator variance.

divergences.query: parcelas de maior relevância e valor significativo

provenance: Local run against Azure OpenAI. NOT produced by CI — ci.yml runs the keyless Layer 1 only (the judge skips without a key, by design). Reproduce with POST /eval/retrieval and POST /eval/judge (Eval__JudgeRuns=5) when a key is configured.
interpretation: The semantic embedder lifts recall from 26% to 42% at the same relevance cutoff. The 16% Layer 1 / Layer 2 divergence is one-directional: the lexical gate marks 4 answers not-faithful that the judge scores groundedness 5/5 — the cheap gate is conservative (no false pass) but pessimistic. Agreement is stable at 84% +/- 0 pp across 5 runs.
